PROCUREMENT RECORDS EXPORT — CAIRN BRAE WIND FARM
Asset: Cairn Brae Wind Farm O&M operation (WTG-01 to WTG-20; gearbox asset tags CB-GBX-01 to CB-GBX-20)
Reporting period: 01 January 2022 to 29 February 2024
Date generated: 25 February 2024
Source system: Cairn Brae procurement and stores module (purchase-order ledger)

Note: the entries below are purchase-order line items exactly as held in the procurement system, listed in approximate chronological order by order date. Each purchase order block carries a PO number, the contracted supplier, the order and delivery dates, and the cost centre to which the line items were booked. One line item is shown per line. Prices are in pounds sterling (GBP) and exclude VAT unless otherwise stated. This export is provided for audit and reconciliation purposes only.

Total purchase orders in export: 90. Reconciled against goods-received notes and stores issue records as at 25 February 2024.
